The Column contains the specific mapping for each usefull column. All the mapping and all settings for each column will be configured here.
The template is the starting entity for the excel module. This wrapper contains all the settings for the excel import.
Within this template several columns can be added.
The TemplateDocument acts as a file which can be used for two purposes, 1. generate a template, 2. Import the excel sheet using the associated template

For each reference that is used in the mapping, you can configure what should happen if a referenced object is not found. Just like in the modeler the value of a reference(set) can be added to the current values of be overwritten.
Print message when reference is not found
Keep track of all the object keys in this association that could not be found. Warning: This consumes a lot of memory since all values need to be remembered.
Even if there aren't any changes to the object still commit the objects in order to execute the events.
Besides the basic settings in the Template this entity contains all advanced settings.
This entity can not exist without a template
c5c87a5d2b4a1a4b858d81d077018dbe: This template offers the opportunity to log every change made on an object.
Please be aware of the following requirements when using this template.
- The meta-model must contain the references 'Log_User' and 'LogLine_Log'. The other references are refering to objects that need to be logged.
- The 'Log' object has the following attributes: LogObject, DateTime,  NumberOfChangedMembers and LogType.
- The 'LogLine' object has the following attributes: MemberType, Member, OldValue and NewValue.
- Every object that you would like to log needs the AuditTrail.AudittrailSuperClass as a superclass exept for entities that inherite from the System.User object.

71ae1fb6f97d02409300a3ef6aa8ea69: An attempt to authenticate/authorize via OIDC in this app. This is a one time use object that stores nonce and state to avoid replay attacks.
A URL at the OP to which an RP can perform a redirect to request that the End-User be logged out at the OP.
Use this url in an iframe (Web), redirect (web), or webview (native) to perform a logout at the OP (identity provder).
* Deprecated: This Enumeration has been deprecated and moved to Userparsing Association
Represents a single OIDC client registration.

If you want to get a Refresh Token for your authorization, make sure to add it to your OAuth Scope in your Connected App. Also add the refresh_token parameter to your scope when requesting authorization
An OAuth access token granted by the OIDC provider via the associated ClientConfiguration object.

If you want to get a Refresh Token for your authorization, make sure to add it to your OAuth Scope in your Connected App. Also add the refresh_token parameter to your scope when requesting authorization
A URL at the OP to which an RP can perform a redirect to request that the End-User be logged out at the OP.
Use this url in an iframe (Web), redirect (web), or webview (native) to perform a logout at the OP (identity provder).
Represents a single OIDC client registration.
